svg.text: HMVEC-L, TMT16-plex, TiO₂ enrichment (n=4 bio. reps.)
Signaling bifurcation from shared FAK node
Dasatinib 10 nM (Src inhibitor); LY294002 10 µM (PI3K); Tirofiban 1 µg/ml (β3)

Fig. 3 | Signaling cascade divergence after hantavirus infection. A, Volcano plot of phosphoproteomic changes (HTNV vs ANDV, 2 h p.i.). B, Bifurcation of signaling from shared FAK-Y397 activation. C, TEER barrier integrity with dasatinib rescue. D, Complement receptor upregulation (HTNV-specific). E, VE-cadherin Y658 phosphorylation and inhibitor rescue.
